scope.question: extraction_refresh: The D+Q bone RCT now has registry-extracted endpoint-level outcome/result records, but DKD, IPF, and AD-risk human studies remain triage-level; the bone RCT also still needs full publication table and supplement reconciliation.

inputs.summary: Coordinator job spec; no context_pack_path was present when initially read.
Target coverage gap for DKD, IPF, AD-risk exact-effect extraction and D+Q bone publication-table reconciliation.
DKD D+Q pilot source metadata and PubMed locator.
IPF D+Q randomized pilot source metadata and PubMed locator.
AD-risk D+Q pilot source metadata and PubMed locator.
Outcome/result boundary and provenance requirements used for scoped extraction refresh.

outputs.summary: Created the coverage-gap repair candidate and updated DKD plus AD-risk records to PubMed abstract-located extraction, corrected the IPF randomized-pilot sample size, and added an IPF abstract-located dosing-completion outcome/result. The repair is partial because source-snapshot-backed PubMed/PMC extraction and D+Q bone publication-table reconciliation remain open.

proposed_records.rationale: Tracks the bounded extraction repair candidate and review-lane contract.
Updates the exact-effect coverage gap state after abstract-located extraction progress.
Adds abstract-located DKD sample, dosing, timing, and maturity details.
Adds abstract-located DKD endpoint and timing details.
Adds abstract-located DKD sample, dosing, timing, and directional effect details.
Upgrades the DKD finding from generated triage text to abstract-located evidence wording.
Adds abstract-located AD-risk dose schedule and completion count.
Adds abstract-located AD-risk MoCA and TNF-alpha endpoint details.
Adds abstract-located AD-risk MoCA, TNF-alpha, and correlation effect values.
Upgrades the AD-risk finding from generated triage text to abstract-located evidence wording.
Corrects the IPF randomized-pilot sample size and adds abstract-located dose schedule details.
Adds an abstract-located IPF scheduled-dose and planned-assessment completion endpoint.
Adds an abstract-located IPF scheduled-dose and planned-assessment completion result.

blocking_issues: Durable PubMed/PMC source snapshots were not created for DKD, IPF, or AD-risk, so the updated records are PubMed abstract-located and remain below source-snapshot-backed extraction grade.
The legacy IPF generic outcome/result records still need full article reconciliation; this worker added a separate abstract-located dosing-completion result and corrected the study sample size.
The D+Q bone full publication tables and supplements remain unreconciled in this bounded pass.
Full npm run verify:knowledge-base did not complete because audit:worktree-helper timed out, although npm run verify:knowledge-base:post-run passed.
next_actions: Run source-snapshot-backed PubMed/PMC ingestion for PMIDs 31542391, 36857968, and 40010154, then update extracted provenance with source_snapshot_id and text_snapshot_id where eligible.
Run the required extraction_fidelity, synthesis_boundary, and taxonomy_mapping review lanes for coverage-gap-senolytics-exact-effect-extraction-repair.
Reconcile the legacy IPF outcome/result records and the D+Q bone article/supplement tables before treating this coverage gap as closed.
